name: Gingered Bananas
recipeIngredient: 3 Firm ripe bananas, peeled and cut into 2-inch sections
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter over medium-high heat in a skillet until foamy.
2. Add bananas and ginger; sauté for 2-3 minutes or until golden.
3. Remove the bananas to serving plates.
4. Add sugar and rum; quickly stir into butter for 20-30 seconds, or until a sauce forms.
5. Place hot sauce over bananas and sprinkle with coconut.
As an option, stir chopped stem ginger into ice cream and serve over bananas.
